description: Create and deploy a channel named 'Latency_Monitor' that listens on TCP port 6661 and routes HL7 ADT messages based on the latency between the event occurrence (EVN-2) and the message generation (MSH-7). Calculate latency in minutes using the 'yyyyMMddHHmmss' timestamp format. Route messages with latency greater than 10 minutes to /home/ga/latency_high/ and all other messages to /home/ga/latency_normal/. The REST API is available at https://localhost:8443/api (admin/admin).
